scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter @trapit/web build && corepack pnpm --filter @trapit/mobile typecheck
scripts.lint: corepack pnpm --filter @trapit/web lint && corepack pnpm --filter @trapit/mobile lint
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --filter @trapit/auth typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @trapit/web typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @trapit/mobile typecheck
